tldr_zh: Anthropic推Claude Science和Claude Sonnet 5，Google發布Nano Banana 2 Lite，Meta腦機介面新進展，美最高法院裁決多項重大案件。
tldr_en: Anthropic launches Claude Science and Sonnet 5, Google releases Nano Banana 2 Lite, Meta advances brain-computer interface, US Supreme Court makes major rulings.

items.title_zh: Anthropic推出Claude Science科研助手與Claude Sonnet 5廉價模型
items.title_en: Anthropic Launches Claude Science and Claude Sonnet 5 Models
items.summary_zh: Anthropic在製藥業高管會議上正式推出Claude Science，這是專為科學研究設計的旗艦產品，可自主執行複雜科學工作。同時發布Claude Sonnet 5，具備更強的智能體能力和更低的定價，定位為Opus和GPT-5.5的平價替代方案。
items.summary_en: Anthropic unveiled Claude Science, a new flagship product designed for scientific research that can autonomously execute meaningful work. The company also launched Claude Sonnet 5, offering stronger agentic capabilities at lower pricing as a cheaper alternative to Opus and GPT-5.5.

items.title_zh: Meta用腦磁波實現無創腦機介面，直接從打字腦訊號重建語句
items.title_en: Meta Advances Non-Invasive Brain-Computer Interface with Brain2Qwerty
items.summary_zh: Meta發表Brain2Qwerty v2研究，利用腦磁波儀（MEG）記錄打字時的腦部活動，用AI重建自然語句。此技術無需手術植入電極，為語言障礙患者提供了新的溝通方式，是非侵入式腦機介面研究的重要進展。
items.summary_en: Meta announced Brain2Qwerty v2 research that reconstructs natural language from brain signals during typing using non-invasive MEG scanning and AI. This surgical-free approach offers new communication possibilities for people with speech or movement disabilities.

items.title_zh: Google推Nano Banana 2 Lite圖像模型，速度快成本低
items.title_en: Google Introduces Nano Banana 2 Lite Image Model
items.summary_zh: Google推出Nano Banana 2 Lite圖像生成模型，相比前代大幅降低成本，生成速度更快。該模型雖然畫質有所降低，但對需要快速、廉價AI內容創建的用戶更具吸引力。
items.summary_en: Google released Nano Banana 2 Lite, a faster and cheaper image generation model. While image quality is lower than predecessors, it offers significant cost savings and speed benefits for creators seeking rapid AI-generated content.

items.title_zh: OpenAI發布GeneBench-Pro基因組學AI性能基準測試
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出GeneBench-Pro，這是一個新的基準測試工具，用於評估AI在基因組學、生物學和科學研究中的表現，採用真實世界的複雜數據集。該工具有助於推動AI在生物醫學領域的進步。
items.summary_en: OpenAI unveiled GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark for testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex real-world datasets, advancing AI capabilities in biomedical research.

items.title_zh: Anthropic Claude Fable 5解除出口管制，恢復全球訪問
items.title_en: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 Regains Access After Export Controls Lifted
items.summary_zh: 美國商務部正式解除對Anthropic Claude Fable 5和Mythos 5的出口管制。經過與川普政府數週協商後，Anthropic宣布將於隔日恢復這些模型的全球訪問，這是AI國際競爭中的重要轉折。
items.summary_en: The US Department of Commerce lifted export controls on Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 after weeks of negotiations with the Trump administration. Anthropic announced plans to restore global access to these models, marking a significant shift in AI international competition.

items.title_zh: NVIDIA競爭者Etched達50億美元估值，晶片訂單突破10億美元
items.title_en: Etched Hits $5B Valuation with $1B in AI Chip Contracts
items.summary_zh: AI晶片新興廠商Etched達到50億美元估值，並已獲得10億美元的推理系統合約。該公司正在挑戰NVIDIA在AI晶片市場的主導地位，展現了第三方AI加速器市場的成長潛力。
items.summary_en: Etched, an AI chip competitor to NVIDIA, achieved a $5 billion valuation with $1 billion in already-booked contracts for inference systems. The company is challenging NVIDIA's market dominance with growing demand for alternative AI accelerators.

items.title_zh: Amazon遭FTC罰款225萬美元，因未助身份盜竊受害者
items.title_en: Amazon Fined $2.25 Million for Identity Theft Victim Support Failure
items.summary_zh: 美國FTC對Amazon罰款225萬美元，指控其拒絕提供身份盜竊受害者的詐欺交易信息。此舉違反公平信用報告法，反映了Amazon在消費者保護方面的缺失。
items.summary_en: The FTC fined Amazon $2.25 million for failing to provide customers victimized by identity theft with information about fraudulent purchases, violating Fair Credit reporting requirements.

items.title_zh: Google NotebookLM推出TikTok風格短影片功能
items.title_en: Google NotebookLM Launches TikTok-Style AI Video Generation
items.summary_zh: Google為NotebookLM推出60秒垂直AI短影片生成功能，現已向Google AI Ultra和Pro訂閱者推出。該功能能根據上傳的源文本自動生成類似TikTok風格的影片，有助於快速消化研究內容。
items.summary_en: Google added TikTok-style AI video generation to NotebookLM, enabling 60-second vertical clip creation from uploaded sources. The feature is rolling out to Google AI Ultra and Pro subscribers for easier research consumption.

items.title_zh: Apple向最高法院上訴Epic訴訟案，挑戰反壟斷裁決
items.title_en: Apple Appeals Epic Case to Supreme Court Over App Store Monopoly
items.summary_zh: Apple正式向美國最高法院上訴Epic訴訟案，挑戰法院關於其應對裁定不遵從的藐視法庭認定。此案涉及App Store應用商店費用的反壟斷爭議，可能對科技業監管產生深遠影響。
items.summary_en: Apple appealed to the US Supreme Court in its antitrust dispute with Epic Games, challenging the court's contempt of court finding. The case involves App Store fee practices and could significantly impact tech industry regulation.

items.title_zh: 美超微AI伺服器違法出口案擴大，台灣多家科技公司遭搜索
items.title_en: Taiwan Supermicro AI Server Illegal Export Case Expanded
items.summary_zh: 基隆地檢署擴大偵辦高階AI伺服器涉嫌違法出口中國案，搜索美超微台灣分公司、青雲科技及是方電訊等。涉案設備為搭載NVIDIA高階GPU的伺服器，疑似透過虛報流向規避美國出口管制。
items.summary_en: Taiwan's prosecutors expanded investigation into illegal AI server exports, searching Supermicro Taiwan, QingYun Tech, and other companies. The case involves NVIDIA GPU-equipped servers allegedly exported to sanctioned regions using false documentation.

items.title_zh: 美最高法院維護出生公民權，駁回川普限縮行政命令
items.title_en: US Supreme Court Upholds Birthright Citizenship, Rejects Trump Order
items.summary_zh: 美國最高法院裁定維護憲法第14修正案的出生公民權原則，否決川普總統試圖限縮出生公民權的行政命令。此裁決對其反移民政策構成重大挫折，為移民家庭帶來法律保護。
items.summary_en: The US Supreme Court upheld birthright citizenship under the 14th Amendment, rejecting President Trump's executive order to restrict it. The ruling represents a major setback for Trump's anti-immigration agenda.

items.title_zh: 韓聖淑出任韓國總理，成韓國史上第二位女性總理
items.title_en: Han Seung-soo Becomes South Korea's Second Female Prime Minister
items.summary_zh: 韓國國會通過韓聖淑出任國務總理，成為韓國歷史上第二位女性總理。韓聖淑曾擔任Naver執行長，出身科技業，將帶來不同的政治視角。
items.summary_en: South Korea's parliament confirmed Han Seung-soo as prime minister, making her the nation's second female PM. The former Naver CEO brings a tech industry background to the role.
